$metadata.namingPolicy: Preserve Figma slash-delimited variable names as nested DTCG token paths; style names remain under style.*; Primitive/* pages export to component.*, Product/* pages export to pattern.*.
$metadata.modePolicy: Primitive uses a single Default value; Semantic values preserve Figma Light and Dark modes.
notes: Component and pattern sections aggregate variant dimensions, spacing, radius, layout mode, component properties, and unique token/style bindings from reusable Product and Primitive pages.
Icon artwork pages are treated as assets, not component or pattern tokens.

general.$description: Semantic page background for most pages. Light theme variant.

main.$description: Semantic page background for token main, claim, and other promotional pages. Light theme variant.

xaut_card.$description: XAUT card gradient — 60% white glassmorphism to pale blue accent.

bar_backdrop.$description: Tab bar backdrop gradient — transparent white to solid white for feathered top edge.

general.$description: Semantic page background for most pages. Dark theme variant.

main.$description: Semantic page background for token main, claim, and other promotional pages. Dark theme variant.

xaut_card.$description: XAUT card gradient in dark mode — near-black warm undertone to elevated dark gray.

bar_backdrop.$description: Tab bar backdrop gradient in dark mode — transparent near-black to near-pure-black.

Message#3202:0.defaultValue: Transaction submitted. Tap to check status.
